title: Why USA is disadvantaged in AI Race
summary: Caleb Writes Code argues that while the US dominates AI chips, models, and applications, China holds a power generation and infrastructure advantage critical for scaling data centers. The analysis traces this gap to political structure: US fragmentation across jurisdictions versus China's centralized mandate approach, affecting everything from transmission lines to where hyperscalers build facilities.
